## Scope

Describe software or governance changes only. Do not paste real venue-derived
evidence, identifiers, counters, timestamps, hashes, manifests, paths, or local
evidence references.

## Boundary checklist

- [ ] Changed files contain only code, declared synthetic fixtures, generic governance, software provenance, or Boolean safety results.
- [ ] No legacy evidence path was modified, renamed, copied, or deleted.
- [ ] New fixtures declare synthetic provenance and contain no copied venue payload.
- [ ] The title, body, commits, reviews, and expected CI output contain no real evidence.
- [ ] No credential, account/order data, production endpoint, or order-write path was added.
- [ ] `Forward-Only Data Boundary`, `No Secrets`, and `Synthetic Fixture Provenance` pass.

## Validation

List commands and pass/fail status only. Keep detailed evidence owner-local.
